name: Data Transformer: Fetch, Transform, and Post JSON to Slack
description: Data transformer pipeline: fetches JSON data from a public API, transforms and enriches it with a code step, formats the output nicely, and posts the results to Slack using Block Kit.

source.originalName: Learn JSON basics with an interactive step-by-step tutorial for beginners

apiUrl.description: Public API URL to fetch JSON from (default: JSONPlaceholder posts)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the transformed data

steps.name: Fetch JSON data from public API
Transform and enrich the JSON data
Build Slack Block Kit message with formatted results
